trivia: The definitive Jumbo: winglets, a two-crew glass cockpit, and two decades as the flagship of nearly every major international airline. Passenger examples are now down to a precious few.
The hump needs no explanation; the -400's winglets separate it from earlier classics at any distance.
funFacts: Nearly 700 were built across all -400 versions.
